# IFTM University Moradabad

> IFTM University is a NAAC 'A' Grade accredited private university located in Moradabad, Uttar Pradesh, India. Established in 2001, it offers 130+ programmes across 12 schools covering Diploma, Undergraduate, Postgraduate, and Doctoral levels.

## Key Facts

- **Full Name**: IFTM University (Institute of Foreign Trade and Management)
- **Location**: Lodhipur Rajput, Delhi Road, Moradabad, Uttar Pradesh - 244102, India
- **Established**: 2001
- **Accreditation**: NAAC 'A' Grade
- **Approvals**: UGC, AICTE, PCI, BCI
- **Campus**: 69+ acres
- **Students**: 10,000+
- **Faculty**: 500+
- **Programmes**: 130+
- **Placement Rate**: 90%+
- **Highest Package**: ₹12 LPA
- **Recruiting Partners**: 500+

## Schools & Departments

1. School of Business Management (SBM) — BBA, B.Com, MBA, M.Com, Ph.D.
2. School of Pharmaceutical Sciences (SPS) — D.Pharm, B.Pharm, M.Pharm, Ph.D.
3. School of Computer Science & Applications (SCA) — BCA, B.Sc CS, MCA, Ph.D.
4. School of Engineering & Technology (SET) — B.Tech, M.Tech, Diploma, Ph.D.
5. School of Biotechnology (SBT) — B.Sc, M.Sc, Ph.D.
6. School of Sciences (SOS) — B.Sc, M.Sc, Ph.D.
7. School of Law (SOL) — LL.B, Integrated Law, LLM, Ph.D.
8. School of Education & Humanities — B.Ed, M.Ed, MA, Ph.D.
9. School of Agricultural Sciences — B.Sc Agriculture, M.Sc, Ph.D.
10. BA (Hons.) Programmes — English, Hindi, Economics, Geography, Sociology, Political Science, History, Sanskrit
11. Library & Information Science — B.Lib, M.Lib, Ph.D.
12. University Polytechnic — Diploma programmes

## Leadership

- **Chancellor**: Rajiv Kothiwal
- **Pro Chancellor**: Abhinav Kothiwal
- **Vice Chancellor**: Prof. M. P. Pandey
- **Registrar**: Prof. Sanjeev Agarwal
- **Founder**: (Late) Shri Onkar Saran Kothiwal

## Accreditations & Approvals

- NAAC 'A' Grade
- UGC (University Grants Commission) under Section 2(f)
- AICTE (All India Council for Technical Education)
- PCI (Pharmacy Council of India)
- BCI (Bar Council of India)
